chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: : قال الله (جلّ جلاله) عبدي المؤمنُ لا أصرفه في شئ الاّ جعلتُ ذلك خيراً له، فلْيرضَ بقضائي وليصبرْ على بلائي وليشكرْ على نعمائي أكتُبْه في الصدّيقين عندي.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 48. It has been related that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Allah [M.G] says: Whatever I divert and keep away from My believing servant, I make it good for him. So, let him be pleased with My decree, and let him bear patience over My trials, and let him give thanks over My blessings - and I shall record him amongst the truthful ones.
